reviews.review_description: I am disappointed with this game when you download a video within the game from the mainframe police computer it takes forever. Is this based on real time download? Also it very well needs gamepad support because the touch pad and vr controller is very weak. Thanks. I will give this full marks when problems are fixed.

developer_response.body: We have fixed the waiting time problem when watching videos for the first time. Now all videos are part of the game installation, meaning once you start playing there will be no need to download anything any longer, so no more waiting time! Thanks for your feedback.

reviews.review_title: I give up! Solve the murder your self!

reviews.review_description: For a short interactive experience don't need checkpoint/save feature but for this is definitely needed. Apart from that was great would have rated 4 if was able to finish it. Tried 3 times at different occasions was unable to compete in 1 sitting as more than 1 hr long.

developer_response.body: Thats valuable feedback, we will add a save feature in coming update of the game. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Innovative and immersive way of walking inside the game.
One of the most immersive games I played so far on gear VR. And an interesting way to move in the game.
It’s Sort of scary but only because like it looks scary video I just haven’t played the Game enough

I played this on the Oculus GO. For anyone trying this game and finding they can't move about, just repeatedly click the trigger on the controller and each time you do, you take a step.

The controls of this game let it down. There is no way to call up your inventory or refer to your tablet for the game objectives, these things just happen for you when the game thinks you need them to. I didn't quite complete the game as I couldn't work out the CCTV screenshots puzzle. It would have been nice to know if I had got any correct before I got all three.

As for the story. I assume it was supposed to be amusingly silly. "The only way to stop the cops wrongly arresting you for murder is to break in to the police station and rearrange evidence they already have." That's funny.

With a bit more work this could be a decent game.
Why she no started?write update oculus

developer_response.body: Could you please give us some more descriptive feedback?

reviews.review_description: I've played the first time for like 3 mind and my phone died but when I opened it the second time my character was just jumping in one place and I couldn't move. I've uninstalled clear data does not want to work again

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! Sorry to hear you have problems even after clearing the cache. If you get in touch with us at info@impactunified.com we can try helping you out.

reviews.review_description: I like games where you can interact with things and I would like to see more games like that but the controls, the story and object interaction need work, anyways how did he know the tea was poisoned? How cant the police tell someone broke in and moved stuff all over the place?

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback! 
He did not know the tea was poisoned, but from a long career as KGB agent in the intelligence business he has developed this habit just in case, for survival. The police in this case are a bit lazy, otherwise they would have solved the murder them selves!

reviews.review_description: I almost wet my self in the start of the game. LOVE IT!😁
Yo it wont even let me install it

developer_response.body: Hi, sorry to hear that. Could you please provide some more information about the symptoms you see when the install fails. Would also be great if you share which VR device you are using.
